changes.summary: Permission errors logged while listing resources during export are now recorded more reliably when multiple resource types are processed concurrently, improving consistency of the end-of-run error summary.
Export sanitization now invokes custom attribute resolvers that require provider client configuration, which may update exported attribute values where those resolvers are defined.

related_export_changes.summary: Exported string attributes that reference other resources and use ID transformation during resolution may now have the entire attribute value resolved as a Terraform reference, rather than preserving surrounding text while substituting only the embedded identifier portion.
